causeName: Singapore Red Cross 11
causeDesc: We call for your support towards the Singapore Red Cross (SRC)'s humanitarian response to the 7.8 magnitude earthquake that devastated Turkey and Syria. Your donation will go towards supporting the needs of those affected by the earthquake, including emergency shelter, first aid and food.

SRC has earlier pledged USD $50,000 each in humanitarian aid to the Turkish Red Crescent (TRC) and the Syrian Arab Red Crescent (SARC) to directly support their ongoing relief efforts.

"We are deeply saddened by the loss of lives and injury, as well as damage to property and livelihoods, arising from the devastating disaster, and are committed to supporting the emergency relief and recovery operations," said Mr Benjamin William, Secretary General/CEO of Singapore Red Cross, "We hope the people of Singapore will support our fundraising appeal, to bring hope and help to affected communities in Turkey and Syria."

{ "taskTitle": "Send a PERMA Survey Reminder", "subtitle": "Ensure maximum participation by sending a reminder for the PERMA survey.", "taskDesc": "
How to Set Reminders for the PERMA Survey

Keep participation high by setting reminders for your PERMA survey. Here’s how:

Step 1: Click on the PERMA Evaluation that was recently created.

Step 2: You will see a Send Reminder option.

Step 3: Click on Send Reminder to nudge employees who haven’t completed the survey.

", "isSkippable": false, "taskType": "perma_reminder", "taskCategory": "adoption_drive", "platform": "web" }

{ "taskTitle": "Launch Your First PERMA Survey", "subtitle": "Assess your team’s overall wellbeing with your first PERMA survey.", "taskDesc": "
What is the PERMA Survey?

The PERMA Survey in CHOYS is designed to measure 5 core elements of employee wellbeing: Positive Emotion, Engagement, Relationships, Meaning, and Accomplishment. It provides key insights to help you enhance satisfaction and performance across your workforce.

How to Conduct a PERMA Survey

Ready to conduct a PERMA Survey? Follow these steps:

Step 1: Click on Surveys in the navigation menu.

Step 2: Click on PERMA under “Create New Survey.”

Step 3: Set your survey’s end date to define when it will close.

Step 4: Launch the survey and start gathering insights into your team’s wellbeing!

", "isSkippable": false, "taskType": "perma", "taskCategory": "adoption_drive", "platform": "web" }

{
		"taskTitle": "Personalise Your Portal!",
		"subtitle": "You’ve got a great start! Invite your team to CHOYS and create a healthier workplace.",
		"taskDesc": "",
		"isSkippable": false,
		"taskType": "company_logo",
		"taskCategory": "foundation_week",
		"platform": "web"
}

{
		"taskTitle": "Invite Your Team and Grow Your Wellness Squad",
		"subtitle": "You’ve got a great start! Invite your team to CHOYS and create a healthier workplace.",
		"taskDesc": "",
		"isSkippable": false,
		"taskType": "user_invitation",
		"taskCategory": "foundation_week",
		"platform": "web"
}

{ "taskTitle": "Launch a Quick Poll", "subtitle": "Curious about what your team thinks? Create a poll to get instant insights and make better decisions.", "taskDesc": "
What is a Poll?

A poll is a simple tool that allows you to gather feedback from your employees by asking them to vote on specific questions. It’s a quick and effective way to understand their opinions and preferences.

How to Create a Poll?

Step 1: Click 'Polls' on the left menu.

Step 2: Click 'Add Poll.'

Step 3: Enter the title, description, and date.

Step 4: Select the type of questions.

Step 5: Ensure the status is 'Active.'

Step 6: Check 'Push Notification' for mobile alerts.

", "isSkippable": false, "taskType": "poll", "taskCategory": "foundation_week", "platform": "web" }

{ "taskTitle": "Kick Off a Steps Challenge!", "subtitle": "Your team’s energy is picking up, keep them on their toes with a fun steps challenge!", "taskDesc": "
How to Organise a Steps Challenge

Step 1: Go to Challenges on the navigation bar.

Step 2: Click on Create New Challenge.

Step 3: Set your challenge parameters, like the start date, end date, and goal (e.g., number of steps).

Step 4: Invite your team to join the challenge and motivate them to keep stepping!

Step 5: Track progress and celebrate those who hit their step goals.

", "isSkippable": false, "taskType": "challenge", "taskCategory": "engagement_essentials", "platform": "web" }

{ "taskTitle": "Celebrate on the Moment Wall!", "subtitle": "Celebrate team milestones and individual achievements by posting on the Moment Wall.", "taskDesc": "
What is a Moment Wall?

The Moment Wall is your company’s virtual bulletin board, a space where you can celebrate successes, share achievements, and spread positive vibes. It’s a place for your team to come together and recognise each other’s accomplishments, big or small, in a fun and engaging way!

How to Post on the Moment Wall

Posting on the Moment Wall is a breeze! Here’s how you do it:

Step 1: Go to Celebrations on the navigation bar.

Step 2: Click on Add a Post.

Step 3: Enter a title, and description, and add an image if you want.

Step 4: Click on Create Post to share your team’s latest achievements or milestones.

", "isSkippable": false, "taskType": "post", "taskCategory": "engagement_essentials", "platform": "web" }

{
		"taskTitle": "Discover Recognition Insights",
		"subtitle": "Your team is doing amazing! Explore recognition insights to understand what’s driving their engagement",
		"taskDesc": "",
		"isSkippable": false,
		"taskType": "recognition_insights",
		"taskCategory": "celebrations_and_rewards",
		"platform": "web"
}

{ "taskTitle": "Reward Positive Behaviours with Coins", "subtitle": "Your team is on fire! Keep the momentum going by rewarding their positive behaviours with CHOYSCoins", "taskDesc": "
How to Send CHOYS Coins

Step 1: Click on Rewards in the navigation bar.

Step 2: Click on Send Rewards under “Reward Your Employees.”

Step 3: Select the employee(s) you want to reward.

Step 4: Choose a reason from the options, and enter a personal message if you’d like.

Step 5: Enter the number of coins you want to send.

Step 6: Finally, hit the Send Reward Button to deliver the coins!

", "isSkippable": false, "taskType": "rewards", "taskCategory": "celebrations_and_rewards", "platform": "web" }

{
		"taskTitle": "Review Mood Insights!",
		"subtitle": "Your team’s mood and activity levels are looking good—dive into the data to keep everything on track.",
		"taskDesc": "",
		"isSkippable": false,
		"taskType": "mood_insights",
		"taskCategory": "adoption_drive",
		"platform": "web"
}
